'''gozhagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tweakable|tweakable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tweakable|tweakable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gozhagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozhagithi|gozhagithi]] || [[word:gozhagiji|gozhagiji]] || [[word:gozhagishi|gozhagishi]] || [[word:gozhagiki|gozhagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozhaguthuthu|gozhaguthuthu]] || [[word:gozhagujuju|gozhagujuju]] || [[word:gozhagushushu|gozhagushushu]] || [[word:gozhagukuku|gozhagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozhaguthu|gozhaguthu]] || [[word:gozhaguju|gozhaguju]] || [[word:gozhagushu|gozhagushu]] || [[word:gozhaguku|gozhaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozhagufthuf|gozhagufthuf]] || [[word:gozhagufjuf|gozhagufjuf]] || [[word:gozhagufshuf|gozhagufshuf]] || [[word:gozhagufkuf|gozhagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozhagethe|gozhagethe]] || [[word:gozhageje|gozhageje]] || [[word:gozhageshe|gozhageshe]] || [[word:gozhageke|gozhageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozhagothotho|gozhagothotho]] || [[word:gozhagojojo|gozhagojojo]] || [[word:gozhagoshosho|gozhagoshosho]] || [[word:gozhagokoko|gozhagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozhagotho|gozhagotho]] || [[word:gozhagojo|gozhagojo]] || [[word:gozhagosho|gozhagosho]] || [[word:gozhagoko|gozhagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozhagofthof|gozhagofthof]] || [[word:gozhagofjof|gozhagofjof]] || [[word:gozhagofshof|gozhagofshof]] || [[word:gozhagofkof|gozhagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozhagïfthïf|gozhagïfthïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfjïf|gozhagïfjïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfshïf|gozhagïfshïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfkïf|gozhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozhagïfthïfthïf|gozhagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfjïfjïf|gozhagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfshïfshïf|gozhagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfkïfkïf|gozhagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozhagïfthïf|gozhagïfthïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfjïf|gozhagïfjïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfshïf|gozhagïfshïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfkïf|gozhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozhagïfthïf|gozhagïfthïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfjïf|gozhagïfjïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfshïf|gozhagïfshïf]] || [[word:gozhagïfkïf|gozhagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gozhagæthæ|gozhagæthæ]] || [[word:gozhagæjæ|gozhagæjæ]] || [[word:gozhagæshæ|gozhagæshæ]] || [[word:gozhagækæ|gozhagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gozhagathatha|gozhagathatha]] || [[word:gozhagajaja|gozhagajaja]] || [[word:gozhagashasha|gozhagashasha]] || [[word:gozhagakaka|gozhagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gozhagatha|gozhagatha]] || [[word:gozhagaja|gozhagaja]] || [[word:gozhagasha|gozhagasha]] || [[word:gozhagaka|gozhagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gozhagafthaf|gozhagafthaf]] || [[word:gozhagafjaf|gozhagafjaf]] || [[word:gozhagafshaf|gozhagafshaf]] || [[word:gozhagafkaf|gozhagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gozhagasha|gozhagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozhagshësha|gozhagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhagrosha|gozhagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhagmusha|gozhagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhagyasha|gozhagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozhagnkshësha|gogozhagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozhagnkrosha|gogozhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozhagnkmusha|gogozhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozhagnkyasha|gogozhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gozhazhagasha|gozhazhagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozhazhagshësha|gozhazhagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhazhagrosha|gozhazhagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazhagmusha|gozhazhagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhazhagyasha|gozhazhagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozhazhagnkshësha|gogozhazhagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozhazhagnkrosha|gogozhazhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozhazhagnkmusha|gogozhazhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozhazhagnkyasha|gogozhazhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gezhægasha|gezhægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gezhægshësha|gezhægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gezhægrosha|gezhægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gezhægmusha|gezhægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gezhægyasha|gezhægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogezhægnkshësha|gogezhægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogezhægnkrosha|gogezhægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogezhægnkmusha|gogezhægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogezhægnkyasha|gogezhægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gozhfagasha|gozhfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gozhfagshësha|gozhfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhfagrosha|gozhfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhfagmusha|gozhfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhfagyasha|gozhfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogozhfagnkshësha|gogozhfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogozhfagnkrosha|gogozhfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogozhfagnkmusha|gogozhfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogozhfagnkyasha|gogozhfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
